blockingIssues.description: Type definition mismatch: The VietnameseImeSettings interface in src/types/electron.d.ts is missing the 'patchedVersion?: string' field. This field is used throughout the codebase (settingsStore.ts, vietnamese-ime.handlers.ts) but is not declared in the shared type definition, which could cause TypeScript errors and runtime type mismatches.
blockingIssues.fix: Added 'patchedVersion?: string;' to VietnameseImeSettings interface in src/types/electron.d.ts (line 21-25). Build verified to pass after fix.

appliedUpdates.description: The vietnamese-ime-patch.md library file already contains comprehensive documentation about the storage key pattern 'vietnamese-ime-settings' including the patchedVersion field, version tracking, and auto-repatch flow. No update needed.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a coding convention: 'When adding fields to Zustand store interfaces, always update the corresponding TypeScript interface definitions in src/types/electron.d.ts to maintain type consistency across the codebase.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature version-tracking-infrastructure implemented patchedVersion field in settingsStore.ts and used it in IPC handlers, but did not update the VietnameseImeSettings interface in src/types/electron.d.ts, creating a type inconsistency that was caught during scrutiny review.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add 'bun test' command to the services.yaml commands section to document the test runner. The project uses bun:test for unit tests (vietnameseImePatch.test.ts exists with 18 passing tests).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature enhanced-patch-logging excluded test files from tsconfig.json as a workaround for missing bun:test types. The 'bun test' command is not documented in services.yaml, making it unclear how to run tests.

rejectedObservations.observation: The concurrency handling pattern (isPatching flag) should be documented in the library.
rejectedObservations.reason: Already documented in vietnamese-ime-patch.md under 'Concurrency Handling' section - no duplicate needed.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document VN_PATCH_DEBUG environment variable in AGENTS.md.
rejectedObservations.reason: Already documented in AGENTS.md under 'To view patch logs' section - no update needed.
